one_time_description: Gaming revenue - non-recurring item not budgeted for
economic_notes: First Nation entered into a contract of purchase and sale for Menzies Bay lots 3 & 4 for $2,650,000. Investments in Nanwakolas Carbon Credit LP (23%), Nanwakolas Forestry LP (18%), Nanwakolas Offset LP (26%), Nanwakolas Timber LP (21%), Nanwakolas Business Corporation (17%), Mamalilikulla Economic Development Corporation (100%), Mamalilikulla Economic Development LP (100%). COVID-19 noted as significant event.
notes: Social Housing is the only consolidated subsidiary; all business enterprises and partnerships accounted for using modified equity method. Gaming revenue of $553,622 is non-recurring and was not budgeted. Funds held in trust decreased significantly due to $1,253,757 transfer to Nation via Band Council Resolution. Land purchase deposit of $140,000 and $33,750 consulting fees recorded as prepaid expenses. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($610,321) and Province of BC ($185,041) and CMHC ($1,661) and FNHA ($7,927) = $2,662,944. COVID-19 noted as significant event with unknown future impact.
